Fix TypeScript build: exclude src/tests from tsconfig.app.json
Set all 6 Vercel env vars (VITE_SUPABASE_URL, VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY, SUPABASE_URL, SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY, ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, FRONTEND_URL)
Live deploy to https://www.pacer.moorelabs.uk — /api/health confirmed {status: ok}

decisions.decision: Vercel-only deployment (no Railway) — frontend + backend on single platform
decisions.rationale: Required: rename api/ → backend/ (Vercel api/ dir convention conflict), add /api prefix to all routes, move entry point to api/index.py for zero-config Python detection.

decisions.decision: api/index.py wraps backend via FastAPI mount at /api
decisions.rationale: Vercel zero-config detects api/ as functions dir. Mount strips /api prefix before delegating to backend.main:app so internal routes stay unchanged.

decisions.decision: Vite proxy uses path-stripping rewrite (/api prefix stripped before forwarding)
decisions.rationale: Keeps backend dev server prefix-free (uvicorn backend.main:app). 10-path proxy collapsed to single /api entry.

next_action: Open https://www.pacer.moorelabs.uk in a browser. Sign up, complete onboarding, verify a training plan is generated, send a chat message and confirm SSE streaming works. Fix any production issues found.
context_notes: PacerAI v1.0 is fully live on Vercel at pacer.moorelabs.uk. Frontend (static) + FastAPI backend (Vercel Python function via api/index.py) both served from same domain. All env vars confirmed set. No Railway needed. The /api/health endpoint is live. Production E2E test is the only blocking remaining item.
